name: /import-eslint-config attempts a semantic mapping when no direct id match is available
command: printf '{"rules":{"prefer-const":"error"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" .eslintrc --mapping-stub semantic-match --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'prefer-const: semantic-match' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
